= mem.recall(\"code patterns\",\n  vec_weight=0.7, fts_weight=0.2, importance_weight=0.1)\n\n# Keyword emphasis\nresults = mem.recall(\"exact error message\",\n  vec_weight=0.2, fts_weight=0.7, importance_weight=0.1)\n\n# Combined with temporal\nresults = mem.recall(\"recent discussions\",\n  temporal_weight=0.5,\n  vec_weight=0.4, fts_weight=0.3,
